---
title: "NOLO Analyses"
output: html_document
date: "04-07-2026"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r Packages}
library(haven)
library(MASS)     
library(dplyr)    
library(car)    
library(srvyr)
library(pscl) 
library(brant)
library(tidyr)
library(survey)
library(openxlsx)
```
```{r Import Data}
NOLO_DATA <- read_sav("NOLO_DATA.sav")
```

#Score Variables
```{r Treatment}
# Treatment flag (1 = Treatment, 0 = Control)
NOLO_DATA$treatment_flag <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$video_treat_group == 2, 1,   
  ifelse(NOLO_DATA$video_treat_group == 1, 0, NA)  
)

# Factor version
NOLO_DATA$treatment_group <- factor(
  NOLO_DATA$treatment_flag,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("Control", "Treatment")
)

# Set reference
NOLO_DATA$treatment_group <- relevel(NOLO_DATA$treatment_group, ref = "Control")

```
```{r Desire outcomes}
# Desire to drink alcohol
NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_alc_ord <- factor(
  NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_alc,
  ordered = TRUE,
  levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
)

# Desire to drink NABs
NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_NABs_ord <- factor(
  NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_NABs,
  ordered = TRUE,
  levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5))

# Lifetime NAB use 
NOLO_DATA$lifetime_NAB_use_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$lifetime_NAB_use == 1, 1,
  ifelse(NOLO_DATA$lifetime_NAB_use == 2, 0, NA)
)

```
```{r Expectancies}
#Positive expectancy score
NOLO_DATA$positive_expectancy_score <- rowMeans(
  NOLO_DATA[, c(
    "positive_expectancies_grid_a",  
    "positive_expectancies_grid_b",  
    "positive_expectancies_grid_c",  
    "positive_expectancies_grid_d"   
  )],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#Negative expectancy score
NOLO_DATA$negative_expectancy_score <- rowMeans(
  NOLO_DATA[, c(
    "negative_expectancies_grid_a",  
    "negative_expectancies_grid_b",  
    "negative_expectancies_grid_c",  
    "negative_expectancies_grid_d"  
  )],
  na.rm = TRUE
)

#Binary scale scores
NOLO_DATA$positive_expectancy_binary_score <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$positive_expectancy_score >= 3, 1, 0
)

NOLO_DATA$positive_expectancy_binary_score <- as_factor(NOLO_DATA$positive_expectancy_binary_score)

NOLO_DATA$negative_expectancy_binary_score <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$negative_expectancy_score >= 3, 1, 0
)
```
```{r Susceptibility}
# drink if offered
NOLO_DATA$drink_if_offered_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$susceptibility_to_use_friend_offer == 1, 0, 1
)

# drink next month
NOLO_DATA$drink_next_month_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$susceptibility_to_use_next_month == 1, 0, 1
)

# curiosity
NOLO_DATA$curiosity_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$susceptibility_to_use_curiosity == 4, 0,
  ifelse(NOLO_DATA$susceptibility_to_use_curiosity %in% c(1, 2, 3), 1, NA)
)

# composite susceptibility
NOLO_DATA$susceptibility_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$drink_if_offered_recode == 0 &
    NOLO_DATA$drink_next_month_recode == 0 &
    NOLO_DATA$curiosity_recode == 0,
  0, 1
)

```
```{r Covariates}
#Gender
NOLO_DATA$gender_recode <- NA
NOLO_DATA$gender_recode[NOLO_DATA$gender4 == 2] <- 0  
NOLO_DATA$gender_recode[NOLO_DATA$gender4 == 1] <- 1   
NOLO_DATA$gender_recode[NOLO_DATA$gender4 %in% c(3, 4)] <- 2   

#Age
NOLO_DATA$age_recode <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$birthyr >= 2005, "Underage", "21+")
NOLO_DATA$age_recode <- factor(NOLO_DATA$age_recode)
NOLO_DATA$age_recode <- relevel(NOLO_DATA$age_recode, ref = "21+")

#Race
NOLO_DATA$race_recode <- dplyr::case_when(
  NOLO_DATA$race == 1 ~ "White",
  NOLO_DATA$race == 2 ~ "Black",
  NOLO_DATA$race == 3 ~ "Hispanic",
  NOLO_DATA$race %in% c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8) ~ "Other",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)
NOLO_DATA$race_recode <- factor(NOLO_DATA$race_recode)
NOLO_DATA$race_recode <- relevel(NOLO_DATA$race_recode, ref = "White")

#Industry-sponsored offline alcohol advertisement
NOLO_DATA$offline_ads_recode <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$past_30_day_alc_ad_exposure_1 == 1, 0, 1)

#Industry-sponsored offline alcohol advertisement
NOLO_DATA$offline_nab_ads_recode <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$past_30_day_NAB_ad_exposure_1 == 1, 0, 1
)

# NAB-related content on social media
NOLO_DATA$smm_nab_exposure_recode <- 
  ifelse(NOLO_DATA$past_30_day_NAB_exposure_8 == 1, 0, 1)

#Alcohol-related content on social media
smm_items <- paste0("past_30_day_alc_exposure_", 1:10)

NOLO_DATA$smm_exposure_recode <- ifelse(
  rowSums(NOLO_DATA[, smm_items] == 1, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
  1, 0
)

#Social media use
NOLO_DATA$social_media_use_recode <- ifelse(
  rowSums(NOLO_DATA[, paste0("social_media_use_", 1:11)] == 1, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
  1, 0
)

#Daily social media use
NOLO_DATA$social_media_daily_user_recode <- ifelse(
  apply(NOLO_DATA[, paste0("social_media_use_freq_", letters[1:11])], 1,
        function(x) any(x == 5, na.rm = TRUE)),
  1, 0
)

#Lifetime alcohol use
NOLO_DATA$lifetime_alcohol <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$lifetime_alc == 1, 1, 0)

#Past 30-day alcohol use
NOLO_DATA$past30_alcohol <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$past_30_days == 9, NA, NOLO_DATA$past_30_days)

#Past 30-day binge drinking
NOLO_DATA$past30_binge <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$past_30_days_binge == 9, NA, NOLO_DATA$past_30_days_binge)
```
```{r Influencer credibility score}
# Traits used in the YouGov file
traits <- c("honesty", "trust", "informed", "intelligence", "attractiveness", "popularity")

# Build variable names for treatment and control videos
treatment_items <- as.vector(sapply(1:14, function(i) {
  paste0("treatment_video_", i, "_perception_", traits)
}))

control_items <- as.vector(sapply(1:14, function(i) {
  paste0("control_video_", i, "_perception_", traits)
}))

# Recode 999 as NA
NOLO_DATA[treatment_items] <- lapply(NOLO_DATA[treatment_items], function(x) ifelse(x == 999, NA, x))
NOLO_DATA[control_items]   <- lapply(NOLO_DATA[control_items], function(x) ifelse(x == 999, NA, x))

# Initialize
NOLO_DATA$influencer_credibility_score <- NA

# Assign row mean based on group
NOLO_DATA$influencer_credibility_score[NOLO_DATA$treatment_group == "Treatment"] <-
  rowMeans(
    NOLO_DATA[NOLO_DATA$treatment_group == "Treatment", treatment_items],
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

NOLO_DATA$influencer_credibility_score[NOLO_DATA$treatment_group == "Control"] <-
  rowMeans(
    NOLO_DATA[NOLO_DATA$treatment_group == "Control", control_items],
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

# Optional binary version (same cutoff as before)
NOLO_DATA$influencer_credibility_score_binary <- ifelse(
  NOLO_DATA$influencer_credibility_score >= 4, 1, 0
)


# Cronbach's alpha for influencer credibility items
traits <- c("honesty", "trust", "informed", "intelligence", "attractiveness", "popularity")

treatment_items <- as.vector(sapply(1:14, function(i) {
  paste0("treatment_video_", i, "_perception_", traits)
}))

control_items <- as.vector(sapply(1:14, function(i) {
  paste0("control_video_", i, "_perception_", traits)
}))

# Recode 999 to NA if applicable
NOLO_DATA[treatment_items] <- lapply(NOLO_DATA[treatment_items], function(x) ifelse(x == 999, NA, x))
NOLO_DATA[control_items]   <- lapply(NOLO_DATA[control_items], function(x) ifelse(x == 999, NA, x))

treatment_data <- NOLO_DATA[treatment_items]
control_data   <- NOLO_DATA[control_items]

alpha_treatment <- psych::alpha(treatment_data, check.keys = TRUE)
alpha_control   <- psych::alpha(control_data, check.keys = TRUE)

alpha_treatment$total$raw_alpha
alpha_control$total$raw_alpha
```

#Weighted Demographics and Covariates
```{r Demographics}
#Function to compute weighted + unweighted summary
get_weighted_table <- function(data, var, weight_var = "weight") {
  total_weight <- sum(data[[weight_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  out <- data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[var]])) %>% 
    group_by(Category = as.character(.data[[var]])) %>% 
    summarise(
      Unweighted_n = n(),
      Unweighted_pct = round(100 * n() / nrow(data), 1),
      Weighted_n = round(sum(.data[[weight_var]], na.rm = TRUE)),
      Weighted_pct = round(100 * sum(.data[[weight_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / total_weight, 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Variable = var) %>%
    select(Variable, Category, Unweighted_n, Unweighted_pct, Weighted_n, Weighted_pct)
  
  return(out)
}

#Variables to summarize
vars <- c("gender_recode",
          "race_recode",
          "age_recode",
          "social_media_daily_user_recode",
          "offline_ads_recode",
          "offline_nab_ads_recode",
          "smm_exposure_recode",
          "smm_nab_exposure_recode" ,
          "lifetime_alcohol",
          "lifetime_NAB_use_recode",
          "influencer_credibility_score_binary")

#Combine all summaries
weighted_tables <- lapply(vars, function(v) get_weighted_table(NOLO_DATA, v))
table1_all <- bind_rows(weighted_tables)

#View
View(table1_all)
write.xlsx(
  table1_all,
  file = "Table1_Demographics.xlsx",
  sheetName = "Table 1",
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```
```{r Weighted age for birth year}
# Define survey design
des <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,
  weights = ~weight,
  data = NOLO_DATA
)

# Weighted mean age
mean_age <- svymean(~age, des, na.rm = TRUE)

# Weighted SD age (sqrt of weighted variance)
sd_age <- sqrt(as.numeric(svyvar(~age, des, na.rm = TRUE)))

# Print results
mean_age
sd_age

mean(NOLO_DATA$age)
sd(NOLO_DATA$age)
```

#Regression Models - Desire to drink alcohol 
```{r Desire to drink alc}
# Regression Model
model1 <- polr(desire_drink_alc_ord ~ treatment_group + 
                gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
                offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
                smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                social_media_daily_user_recode +
                lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
  data = NOLO_DATA,
  Hess = TRUE,
  weights = weight
)

# Summary and p-values
ctable1 <- coef(summary(model1))
p_vals1 <- pnorm(abs(ctable1[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable1 <- cbind(ctable1, "p value" = round(p_vals1, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs1 <- exp(coef(model1))
CIs1 <- exp(confint(model1))
results1 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs1, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs1[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs1[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into single string for easier reporting
results1$OR_95CI <- paste0(results1$OR, " [", results1$CI_lower, ", ", results1$CI_upper, "]")

# Print table
print(results1)
```
```{r Desire to drink alc X influencer credibility}
# Regression Model
model2 <- polr(desire_drink_alc_ord~ treatment_group *
              influencer_credibility_score_binary +
              gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
              offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
              smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
              social_media_daily_user_recode + 
              lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
              data = NOLO_DATA,
              Hess = TRUE,
              weights = weight
              )

# Summary and p-values
ctable2 <- coef(summary(model2))
p_vals2 <- pnorm(abs(ctable2[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable2 <- cbind(ctable2, "p value" = round(p_vals2, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs2 <- exp(coef(model2))
CIs2 <- exp(confint(model2))  
results2 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs2, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs2[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs2[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results2$OR_95CI <- paste0(results2$OR, " [", results2$CI_lower, ", ", results2$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results2)
```

#Regression Models - Desire to NABs
```{r Desire to drink nab}
# Regression Model
model3 <- polr(desire_drink_NABs_ord ~ 
               treatment_group + 
               gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
               offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
               smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
               social_media_daily_user_recode + 
               lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
  data = NOLO_DATA,
  Hess = TRUE,
  weights = weight
)

# Summary and p-values
ctable3 <- coef(summary(model3))
p_vals3 <- pnorm(abs(ctable3[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable3 <- cbind(ctable3, "p value" = round(p_vals1, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs3 <- exp(coef(model3))
CIs3 <- exp(confint(model3))  # uses profile likelihood by default
results3 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs3, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs3[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs3[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into single string for easier reporting
results3$OR_95CI <- paste0(results3$OR, " [", results3$CI_lower, ", ", results3$CI_upper, "]")

# Print table
print(results3)
```
```{r Desire to drink nab X influencer credibility}
# Regression Model
model4 <- polr(desire_drink_NABs_ord~ treatment_group *
              influencer_credibility_score_binary +
              gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
              offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
              smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
              social_media_daily_user_recode + 
              lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
              data = NOLO_DATA,
              Hess = TRUE,
              weights = weight
              )

# Summary and p-values
ctable4 <- coef(summary(model4))
p_vals4 <- pnorm(abs(ctable4[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable4 <- cbind(ctable4, "p value" = round(p_vals4, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs4 <- exp(coef(model4))
CIs4 <- exp(confint(model4))  
results4 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs4, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs4[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs4[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results4$OR_95CI <- paste0(results4$OR, " [", results4$CI_lower, ", ", results4$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results4)
```

#Sensitivity Analyses
```{r Zhang and Yu analysis-alcohol}
# Desire to drink alcohol
NOLO_DATA$desire_binary <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_alc_ord %in% c(4, 5), 1, 0)

# Fit weighted logistic regression model
model_bin <- glm(desire_binary ~ treatment_group + 
                 gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
                 offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
                 smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                 social_media_daily_user_recode +
                 lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                 data = NOLO_DATA,
                 family = binomial(),
                 weights = weight)

summary(model_bin)

# Extract adjusted odds ratio for treatment
OR <- exp(coef(model_bin)["treatment_groupTreatment"])

# Weighted baseline risk (control group)
baseline <- with(
  subset(NOLO_DATA, treatment_group == "Control"),
  weighted.mean(desire_binary, w = weight, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# Convert OR to RR (Zhang & Yu, 1998)
RR <- OR / ((1 - baseline) + (baseline * OR))

OR
RR
baseline


```
```{r Zhang and Yu analysis-NAB}
# Desire to drink nab
NOLO_DATA$desire_binary_nab <- ifelse(NOLO_DATA$desire_drink_NABs_ord %in% c(4, 5), 1, 0)

# Fit weighted logistic regression model
model_bin <- glm(desire_binary_nab ~ treatment_group + 
                 gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
                 offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
                 smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                 social_media_daily_user_recode +
                 lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                 data = NOLO_DATA,
                 family = binomial(),
                 weights = weight)

summary(model_bin)

# Extract adjusted odds ratio for treatment
OR <- exp(coef(model_bin)["treatment_groupTreatment"])

# Weighted baseline risk (control group)
baseline <- with(
  subset(NOLO_DATA, treatment_group == "Control"),
  weighted.mean(desire_binary_nab, w = weight, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# Convert OR to RR (Zhang & Yu, 1998)
RR <- OR / ((1 - baseline) + (baseline * OR))

OR
RR
baseline


```
```{r Proportional odds assumptions}
#Proportional odds assumptions - alc
po_test <- brant(model1)
print(po_test)

#Proportional odds assumptions - NAB
po_test <- brant(model3)
print(po_test)
```

#Null Models
```{r Expectancies}
#Positive expectancy (binary)
model_pos_bin <- glm(positive_expectancy_binary_score ~
                     treatment_group +
                     gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
                     offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
                     smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                     social_media_daily_user_recode + 
                     lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                     data = NOLO_DATA,
                     family = binomial,
                     weights = weight)

#Negative expectancy (binary)
model_neg_bin <- glm(negative_expectancy_binary_score ~
                     treatment_group +
                     gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
                     offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
                     smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                     social_media_daily_user_recode + 
                     lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                     data = NOLO_DATA,
                     family = binomial,
                     weights = weight)

#Odds Ratios + 95% CIs
exp(cbind(OR = coef(model_pos_bin), confint(model_pos_bin)))
exp(cbind(OR = coef(model_neg_bin), confint(model_neg_bin)))
```
```{r Susceptibility alcohol naive}
#Alcohol-naĂŻve subset
NOLO_alc_naive <- NOLO_DATA[NOLO_DATA$lifetime_alc == 2, ]

model_susceptibility_alc_naive <- glm(susceptibility_recode ~                                        treatment_group +
                                  gender_recode + age_recode +
                                  race_recode +
                                  offline_ads_recode +
                                  offline_nab_ads_recode +
                                  smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                                  smm_exposure_recode +
                                  social_media_daily_user_recode +
                                  lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                                  data = NOLO_alc_naive,
                                  family = binomial,
                                  weights = weight)

exp(cbind(
  OR = coef(model_susceptibility_alc_naive),
  confint(model_susceptibility_alc_naive)
))


```
```{r Susceptibility nonalcohol naive}
#Nonnaive dataset
NOLO_alc_non_naive <- NOLO_DATA[NOLO_DATA$lifetime_alc == 1, ]


model_susceptibility_alc_non_naive <- glm(susceptibility_recode ~
                                      treatment_group +
                                      gender_recode + age_recode +
                                      race_recode +
                                      offline_ads_recode +
                                      offline_nab_ads_recode +
                                      smm_nab_exposure_recode +
                                      smm_exposure_recode +
                                      social_media_daily_user_recode +
                                      lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
                                      data = NOLO_alc_non_naive,
                                      family = binomial,
                                      weights = weight)

exp(cbind(
  OR = coef(model_susceptibility_alc_non_naive),
  confint(model_susceptibility_alc_non_naive)
))

## NOTE:The outcome showed minimal variability among lifetime users (~94% susceptible),
# leading to model non-convergence. 
```
```{r Desire to drink alc X past 30 days}
# Regression Model
model3 <- polr(desire_drink_alc_ord~ 
               treatment_group * past30_alcohol +
               gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
               offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
               smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
               social_media_daily_user_recode + 
               lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
               data = NOLO_DATA,
               Hess = TRUE,
               weights = weight
               )

# Summary and p-values
ctable3 <- coef(summary(model3))
p_vals3 <- pnorm(abs(ctable3[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable3 <- cbind(ctable3, "p value" = round(p_vals3, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs3 <- exp(coef(model3))
CIs3 <- exp(confint(model3))  
results3 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs3, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs3[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs3[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results3$OR_95CI <- paste0(results3$OR, " [", results3$CI_lower, ", ", results3$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results3)
```
```{r Desire to drink alc X binge drinking}
# Regression Model
model4 <- polr(desire_drink_alc_ord~ 
               treatment_group * past30_binge +
               gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
               offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
               smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
               social_media_daily_user_recode + 
               lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
               data = NOLO_DATA,
               Hess = TRUE,
               weights = weight
               )

# Summary and p-values
ctable4 <- coef(summary(model4))
p_vals4 <- pnorm(abs(ctable4[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable4 <- cbind(ctable4, "p value" = round(p_vals4, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs4 <- exp(coef(model4))
CIs4 <- exp(confint(model4))  
results4 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs4, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs4[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs4[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results4$OR_95CI <- paste0(results4$OR, " [", results4$CI_lower, ", ", results4$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results4)
```
```{r Desire to drink nab X past 30 days}
# Regression Model
model3 <- polr(desire_drink_NABs_ord~ 
               treatment_group * past30_alcohol +
               gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
               offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
               smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
               social_media_daily_user_recode + 
               lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
               data = NOLO_DATA,
               Hess = TRUE,
               weights = weight
               )

# Summary and p-values
ctable3 <- coef(summary(model3))
p_vals3 <- pnorm(abs(ctable3[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable3 <- cbind(ctable3, "p value" = round(p_vals3, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs3 <- exp(coef(model3))
CIs3 <- exp(confint(model3))  
results3 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs3, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs3[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs3[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results3$OR_95CI <- paste0(results3$OR, " [", results3$CI_lower, ", ", results3$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results3)
```
```{r Desire to drink nab X binge drinking}
# Regression Model
model4 <- polr(desire_drink_NABs_ord~ 
               treatment_group * past30_binge +
               gender_recode + age_recode + race_recode +
               offline_ads_recode + offline_nab_ads_recode +
               smm_exposure_recode + smm_nab_exposure_recode +
               social_media_daily_user_recode + 
               lifetime_alcohol + lifetime_NAB_use_recode,
               data = NOLO_DATA,
               Hess = TRUE,
               weights = weight
               )

# Summary and p-values
ctable4 <- coef(summary(model4))
p_vals4 <- pnorm(abs(ctable4[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
ctable4 <- cbind(ctable4, "p value" = round(p_vals4, 4))

# Odds Ratios and 95% Confidence Intervals
ORs4 <- exp(coef(model4))
CIs4 <- exp(confint(model4))  
results4 <- data.frame(
  OR = round(ORs4, 2),
  CI_lower = round(CIs4[, 1], 2),
  CI_upper = round(CIs4[, 2], 2)
)

# Combine OR + CI into a single formatted column
results4$OR_95CI <- paste0(results4$OR, " [", results4$CI_lower, ", ", results4$CI_upper, "]")

# Print final results
print(results4)
```
